english translation text:
Dua “Ya man ilayhi maljaul ‘ibaad fil muhimmaat”
Tofatus Saaemeen p338/p341d

Here, we say to Allah -  “You developed your servants to be forgiving and compassionate. Oh my Allah do not keep from me that which I expect to get from your generosity. Do not send me away from your boundless reservoir of bounties and do not exclude me from the share of bounties that you distribute freely tonight to the people who obey you, and take me in under your sanctuary to protect me from the evil of the wild creatures.”
So tonight - we need to forgive – so forgive all those who need your forgiveness and ask for forgiveness from those who you require forgiveness from.
In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: يَا مَنْ إلَيْهِ مَلْجَأُ الْعِبَادِ فِي الْمُهِمَّاتِ،
english translation text: Oh He to Whom the servants (of Him) resort in urgencies
and to Whom the creatures turn in ordeals;
Oh He Who knows the open and the hidden matters;

arabic text: يَا مَنْ لا تَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ خَوَاطِرُ الأَوْهَامِ وَتَصَرُّفُ الْخَطَرَاتِ،
english translation text: Oh He from Whom neither the ideas of illusions nor the initiatives of delusions can be concealed;
Oh the Lord of creatures and beings;

arabic text: يَا مَنْ بِيَدِهِ مَلَكُوتُ الأَرَضِينَ وَالسَّمَاوَاتِ،
english translation text: Oh He Who grasps the kingdoms of the earth and the heavens;

arabic text: أَنْتَ اللّهُ لا إلهَ إلاَّ أَنْتَ،
english translation text: You are verily Allah; there is no god save You;

arabic text: أَمُتُّ إلَيْكَ بِلا إلهَ إلاَّ أَنْتَ،
english translation text: I thus try to connect with you in the name of ‘There is no god save You’

arabic text: فَيَا لا إلهَ إلاَّ أَنْتَ اجْعَلْنِي فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ مِمَّنْ نَظَرْتَ إلَيْهِ فَرَحِمْتَهُ،
english translation text: So, Oh He save Whom there is no god: (please) include me at this night with those at whom You have looked and thus You have mercy upon them;
and with those whose prayers have been heard by You and thus You have responded to them;
and with those whose true repentance has been admitted by You and thus You have accepted it;

arabic text: وَتَجَاوَزْتَ عَنْ سَالِفِ خَطِيئَتِهِ وَعَظِيمِ جَرِيرَتِهِ،
english translation text: and You have thus overlooked theirpast sins and enormous offenses.
verily, I am seeking Your shelter against my sins,
and I am resorting to You so that You may conceal my defects.
Oh Allah: (please) bestow lavishly upon me with Your generosity and Favor;
and condone my misdeeds out of Your forbearance and pardon,

arabic text: وَتَغَمَّدْنِي فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ بِسَابِغِ كَرَامَتِكَ،
english translation text: and encompass me, at this night, with Your opulent honoring,

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْنِي فِيهَا مِنْ أَوْلِيَائِكَ الَّذِينَ اجْتَبَيْتَهُمْ لِطَاعَتِكَ،
english translation text: and include me at this night with Your intimate servants whom You have selected for obeying You,
and whom You have chosen for worshipping You,
and whom You have made Your elite and select people.
Oh Allah: (please) make me of those whose efforts are of a happy end,
and those whose shares of good things are big,
and make me of those who enjoy blissful life as they have been safe (from sins)
and those who have been awarded excellently as they have won,
and rescue me from the evil consequences of what I have committed,
and save me from doing more acts of disobedience to You,

arabic text: وَحَبِّبْ إلَيَّ طَاعَتَكَ وَمَا يُقَرِّبُنِي مِنْكَ وَيُزْلِفُنِي عِنْدَكَ.
english translation text: and make me love the acts of obedience to You and whatever draws me near You and approaches me toward You.
Oh my Master: a fugitive resorts to none save You,
and a needy begs none save You,
and only on Your generosity does a repentant, contrite one depends

arabic text: أَدَّبْتَ عِبَادَكَ بِالتَّكَرُّمِ وَأَنْتَ أَكْرَمُ الأَكْرَمِينَ،
english translation text: You have disciplined Your servants by means of generosity; and You are verily the most Generous of all those who are generous.

arabic text: وَأَمَرْتَ بِالْعَفْوِ عِبَادَكَ وَأَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ.
english translation text: and You have instructed Your servants to pardon; and You are verily the All-forgiving, the All-merciful.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ فَلا تَحْرِمْنِي مَا رَجَوْتُ مِنْ كَرَمِكَ،
english translation text: Oh Allah: (please) do not deprive me of Your generosity for which I hope,
and do not make me despair of Your opulent bounties,

arabic text: وَلا تُخَيِّبْنِي مِنْ جَزِيلِ قِسَمِكَ فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ لأهْلِ طَاعَتِكَ،
english translation text: and do not disappoint me of Your abundant sustenance that You decide, this night, for those who are obedient to You,

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْنِي فِي جُنَّةٍ مِنْ شِرَارِ بَرِيَّتِكَ،
english translation text: and include me with Your protection against Your evil creatures.

arabic text: رَبِّ إنْ لَمْ أَكُنْ مِنْ أَهْلِ ذلِكَ فَأَنْتَ أَهْلُ الْكَرَمِ وَالْعَفْوِ وَالْمَغْفِرَةِ،
english translation text: Oh my Lord: If I do not deserve so, then You are worthy of acting generously to me, and pardoning and forgiving me,

arabic text: وَجُدْ عَلَيَّ بِمَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ لا بِمَا أَسْتَحِقُّهُ،
english translation text: and (please) bestow upon me magnanimously according to that which befits You, not according to what I deserve,
verily, I carry an excellent opinion about You,
and I do hope for You,
and my self is hanged to the rope of Your generosity,
for You are verily the most Merciful of all those who show mercy,
and You are the most Generous of all those who are generous.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ وَاخْصُصْنِي مِنْ كَرَمِكَ بِجَزِيلِ قِسَمِكَ،
english translation text: Oh Allah: (please) confer upon me exclusively with an abundant share of what You decide, out of Your generosity,
and I seek refuge with Your pardon against Your chastisement,

arabic text: وَاغْفِرْ لِيَ الذَّنْبَ الَّذِي يَحْبِسُ عَلَيَّ الْخُلُقَ،
english translation text: and (please) forgive me the sin that prevents me from enjoying high morals,
and suppresses my sustenance,
so that I will do that which excellently achieves Your satisfaction
and I will enjoy Your profuse granting,
and I will be delighted by Your abundant bounties.
I am having recourse to Your sanctity,
and I am asking for Your generosity,
and I am taking shelter in Your pardon against Your punishment,
and in Your forbearance against Your ire.
So, (please) bestow upon me generously with that which I have asked from You,
and confer upon me with that which I have begged from You,

arabic text: أَسْأَلُكَ بِكَ لا بِشَيْءٍ هُوَ أَعْظَمُ مِنْكَ.
english translation text: I beseech You in Your name, since there is nothing great that You are.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
